Write the blog post and follow the same pattern as previous posts and use these rules:

- add a link to the previous part at the top (you can see the links in the links.md file). If you don't see the link, add a placeholder.
- always mention that this is an open-source alternative to motion
- ask them to check out the open source version at https://github.com/dotnetfactory/fluid-calendar
- ask them to checkou out the hosted version at https://fluidcalendar.com
- ask them to follow me on twitter at https://x.com/eibrahim
- Use "I" not "We" when writing
- be detailed and specific and make it long form
- if the topic is mentioned in topics.md then remove it after writing it
